perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a grey jacket and a flat cap stands in front of a red wall with "Hermès IN THE MAKING" text, introducing the event. (2) He opens a curtain to reveal the exhibition space, showcasing various luxury handbags in glass display cases. (3) The camera captures close-up shots of craftspeople working on blue leather and assembling bag handles. (4) Visuals shift to colorful silk scarves, a digital slot machine interface, and a large-scale silk screen printing demonstration. (5) Details of porcelain painting and glove making are shown in succession. (6) The man interacts with a mechanical music box made from saddle-making tools and sits on a yellow saddle prop. (7) A craftsman is shown carefully cutting and stitching a leather saddle. (8) The man concludes the video while sitting on the yellow prop, gesturing expressively to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo background music plays continuously while a male voice provides an enthusiastic narration. (2) Faint ambient noise of an exhibition space, including distant chatter, is present behind the main vocal. (3) A specific mechanical chiming sound effect occurs when the narrator interacts with the saddle-tool music box. (4) The music remains at a steady volume throughout, serving as a background for the continuous spoken commentary.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "Hermès IN THE MAKING" - Main exhibition title. (2) Traditional Chinese subtitles translating the narrator's spoken content. (3) "皮革製作-Kelly包" (Leather Making-Kelly Bag) - Descriptive label. (4) "絲巾印染" (Silk Scarf Printing) - Descriptive label. (5) "瓷器彩繪" (Porcelain Painting) - Descriptive label. (6) "馬鞍製作" (Saddle Making) - Descriptive label.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Thematic montage of craftsmanship demonstrations -> Conclusion/Summary

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator, approximately 6 craftsmen and women, 5 visitors in the background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged male with glasses, wearing a grey flat cap, grey blazer, white t-shirt, and light blue jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor exhibition space featuring vibrant red and yellow display structures, brick walls, and various workstations equipped with leatherworking and printing tools.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and promote the 'Hermès In The Making' exhibition by documenting various craftsmanship techniques, aiming to educate viewers on the brand's heritage and attention to detail.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to touring a brand-specific event with high-praise narration.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The host's distinctive hat and glasses style, combined with a 'hands-on' vlog approach.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video emphasizes the tactile nature of luxury goods through close-up shots of artisanal tools and materials.
